candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows high conviction but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0%, the live signal has no historical analog and must be sized down or vetoed regardless of conviction.
testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0: size *= 0.0  # veto; elif green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0: size *= 0.5
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
